description_long: This house is a partially enclosed, single-story structure with several standing exterior walls and an open central courtyard or driveway area. The walls are primarily constructed from concrete or plaster, with some sections featuring green corrugated metal fencing and patches of vegetation. A white car is parked inside the open area, suggesting the space may function as a garage or carport. The ground surface is paved, and there are visible remnants of wall segments, indicating possible damage or incomplete construction. The house lacks a visible roof, and the entry points are defined by gaps in the wall and fencing.
description: A single-story, partially enclosed house with concrete walls, green fencing, and an open paved area containing a parked car.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from a corner angle, highlighting the open paved area, the white car, and green fencing along the perimeter.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a look into the open courtyard, with the car and the surrounding wall segments more visible, and the green fencing prominent on the right.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the rear and side of the house, showing the car from behind and more of the green fencing and wall remnants.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the house from another corner, emphasizing the gaps in the wall, the open entryway, and the mix of concrete and green fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement, few or no visible windows
attribute_entryway_design: Open entryway with no visible door, defined by gaps in the wall and fencing, no porch or decorative elements
